query:
SELECT rep_name, project_id, project_name, location, value, actionTier, discoveryStatus, last_discovery, discoveryAttempts, total_contacts, send_ready
FROM (
  SELECT 
    u.name AS rep_name,
    p.id AS project_id,
    p.name AS project_name,
    p.location,
    p.value,
    p.actionTier,
    p.discoveryStatus,
    DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
    p.discoveryAttempts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.id) FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c3.id) FROM contacts c3 JOIN contactProjects cp3 ON cp3.contactId = c3.id WHERE cp3.projectId = p.id AND c3.crmOrphan = 0 AND c3.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.name ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.priority DESC) AS rn
  FROM users u
  JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
  JOIN projects p ON (
    p.priority = 'hot'
    AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND (
      JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, JSON_QUOTE(p.location), '$')
      OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"NATIONAL"', '$')
      OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"National"', '$')
    )
  )
  WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
    AND u.role = 'user'
) ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY rep_name, rn;

SELECT rep_name, project_id, project_name, location, value, actionTier, discoveryStatus, last_discovery, discoveryAttempts, total_contacts, send_ready
FROM (
  SELECT 
    u.name AS rep_name,
    p.id AS project_id,
    p.name AS project_name,
    p.location,
    p.value,
    p.actionTier,
    p.discoveryStatus,
    DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
    p.discoveryAttempts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.id) FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c3.id) FROM contacts c3 JOIN contactProjects cp3 ON cp3.contactId = c3.id WHERE cp3.projectId = p.id AND c3.crmOrphan = 0 AND c3.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.name ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.priority DESC) AS rn
  FROM users u
  JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
  JOIN projects p ON (
    p.priority = 'hot'
    AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND (
      JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, JSON_QUOTE(p.location), '$')
      OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"NATIONAL"', '$')
      OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"National"', '$')
    )
  )
  WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
    AND u.role = 'user'
) ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY rep_name, rn;
